rationale: Very strong corpus support: 26 points across ~12 distinct companies (Agility Robotics, Anduril Industries, Applied Intuition, Formlabs, Locus Robotics, Motional, Oura, Relativity Space, Saildrone, Skydio, Varda Space Industries, Waabi), median $222K. Broad, well-sourced convergence — upgrading from low to high.
